resultList.dtldesc: Discover a spacious and well-connected 2 BHK apartment for sale in the sought-after locality of Kharghar. Situated within the established residential community of Dream Heights, developed by Asian Buildcon, this ready-to-move residence offers a blend of comfort, convenience, and long-term investment value in one of Navi Mumbai’s most desirable residential destinations.::::Positioned on the 15th floor of a 17-storey tower, the apartment enjoys excellent natural light, ventilation, and pleasant views of the landscaped gardens and swimming pool within the community. With a super built-up area of 1210 sq. ft, the property provides a spacious layout that is ideal for modern family living while ensuring optimal utilisation of space.::::The apartment comprises 2 well-proportioned bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, designed to offer comfort and functionality for everyday living. The unfurnished condition provides complete flexibility for buyers to personalise the interiors according to their own style, preferences, and requirements. Whether you prefer contemporary décor or a more traditional aesthetic, the apartment offers a blank canvas to create your ideal home.::::Located within a well-maintained residential complex, residents benefit from a range of essential facilities that enhance convenience and security. The development is equipped with power backup, reserved parking, professional security services, and service/goods lift facilities, ensuring a comfortable and hassle-free lifestyle. The elevated position of the apartment also contributes to a quieter living environment away from street-level disturbances.::::Kharghar is widely recognised as one of Navi Mumbai’s most planned and rapidly developing residential nodes. The locality offers excellent connectivity to major business districts, educational institutions, healthcare centres, shopping destinations, and recreational facilities. Residents enjoy seamless access to major road networks, public transportation options, and key infrastructure projects that continue to strengthen the area's appeal among homebuyers and investors.::::The neighbourhood is known for its green surroundings, organised urban planning, and strong social infrastructure. Schools, colleges, hospitals, supermarkets, restaurants, banks, and daily convenience stores are easily accessible, making everyday life comfortable and efficient. The presence of parks, open spaces, and recreational amenities further enhances the quality of living for families.::::With its spacious configuration, elevated floor position, attractive garden and pool views, and prime location within Kharghar, this apartment presents an excellent opportunity for both end-users and investors. The combination of a ready-to-move home, established residential community, and strong connectivity makes this property a valuable choice for those seeking a quality residence in Navi Mumbai’s thriving real estate market.

resultList.dtldesc: Gemini said::This 3 BHK apartment in Seawoods offers a premium residential experience in one of Navi Mumbai’s most sought-after and well-planned coastal neighbourhoods. Designed for those who value both space and connectivity, this property provides a sophisticated urban lifestyle with a focus on comfort and modern aesthetics.::::Property Specifications::The residence spans a generous super area of 1,500 sq. ft and is positioned on a higher floor of a well-maintained multi-storey building, ensuring excellent cross-ventilation and natural light. The apartment features three spacious bedrooms and three modern bathrooms, meticulously designed to offer privacy and functionality. The living and dining areas are expansive, flowing seamlessly into private balconies that provide refreshing views of the surrounding cityscape. The property is offered in a semi-furnished condition, featuring quality flooring and premium fittings that serve as an elegant canvas for a personalised home.::::Facilities::Residents benefit from a comprehensive array of facilities designed to ensure a secure and convenient lifestyle. The building is equipped with high-speed elevators, dedicated covered parking for residents, and open parking for visitors. Essential services include 24-hour water supply and a robust power backup system for common areas. The premises are protected by a multi-tier security system, including professional personnel and CCTV surveillance. For recreation, the complex often includes landscaped gardens and dedicated spaces for community interaction.::::Locality::The property is ideally situated in Seawoods, known for its superior infrastructure and proximity to the Seawoods Grand Central Mall, which serves as a major hub for shopping, dining, and entertainment. The neighbourhood is home to reputed educational institutions such as Podar International School and Don Bosco Senior Secondary School. Healthcare needs are well-addressed by nearby facilities like Apollo Hospitals and Terna Speciality Hospital. Connectivity is a standout feature, with the Seawoods-Darave railway station providing direct access to the Harbour Line, and the Palm Beach Road ensuring smooth commutes to other parts of Navi Mumbai and Mumbai.
